diagrams.title: Huffman Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Binary tree showing how codewords are assigned based on frequency
elements: Leaf nodes with characters and frequencies
diagrams.purpose: Shows prefix-free codeword assignment - each character's path from root gives its codeword

diagrams.title: Huffman Encoding Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of building Huffman tree from character frequencies
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates greedy approach - always merging two minimum frequency nodes

diagrams.title: Decoding Process
diagrams.description: Shows how encoded bits are decoded back to original characters
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates prefix decoding - unique path ensures unambiguous reconstruction
